text: Work included under this subcontract agreement shall include but not be limited to all necessary supervision, labor, materials, equipment, fuel and lubricants, temporary structures (including all scaffolding and planking in accordance with OSHA standards, temporary cribbing and bracing), small tools, consumables, safety equipment, freight and mobilization costs, labor burdens, sales and use taxes (where applicable) and other incidentals necessary for the completion of all Granite Countertops furnished by the Subcontractor in strict accordance with this Subcontract Agreement, Formal Bid Package and all related documents contained herein. Subcontractor acknowledges that it  is  responsible for all material shortages or overruns.  Contractor and Owner accept no responsibility for supplying additional material, any receiving, inventory, storage or handling of any material  required  for  this  Scope  of  Work.
